title: Crazy Uncles
desc: Unhappy in their respective marriages, three middle-aged men decide to live life to the fullest. However, their plans go awry when they try to seduce a singer.

title: Bichagadu 2
desc: Trouble arises when a poor ex-convict's brain is transplanted into a rich man's body without consent. While he looks for his sister, he must tackle new problems.

title: Raja Rani
desc: Two people enter an arranged marriage to please their parents, living as strangers under one roof. However, an unforeseen event prompts them to reassess their relationship and emotions.

title: RX 100
desc: Shiva has a passionate affair with Indu, a politician's daughter from the city. However, when they get separated, he becomes angry and prone to extreme violence.

title: Sarkaru Vaari Paata
desc: Mahi tries to retrieve a large amount of money she loaned to her deceitful partner. However, she uncovers a giant banking scandal on her visit.

title: Adhurs
desc: Twin brothers, separated at birth, grow up in vastly different environments. However, they are reunited when one gets kidnapped by gangsters.

title: Chandrakala
desc: A family moves into their ancestral mansion to try to sell it off. However, trouble starts brewing when they experience supernatural phenomena and a ghost mysteriously killing people.

title: Welcome Obama
desc: Yashoda agrees to be a surrogate mother to Lucy, an American lady. Unfortunately, during her pregnancy, Yashoda meets with an accident that jeopardises the child's life.

title: Dhurandar
desc: The presenter discusses the film 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' in terms of its OTT and television release and also talks about its teaser.

title: Masthi Maja
desc: A comprehensive compilation of some of the funniest comedy scenes from popular Telugu movies is played back to back.

title: Ammoru Thalli
desc: A hardworking TV reporter pleads for answers at a temple when the goddess herself appears before him to grant him his wish.

title: Happy Days
desc: Chandu, Madhu and their friends embark on a journey of friendship, love and self-discovery as they experience the highs and lows of college life.

title: Fidaa
desc: An NRI medical student falls in love with a vivacious woman. However, they face challenges in their relationship due to their differences in personalities.

title: Policeodu
desc: A police officer goes into hiding to bring up his daughter in a safe environment. However, after her life is threatened by deadly gangsters, he must face his past to protect his daughter.

title: Kuberan
desc: Sidharthan helps a girl named Pooja to fight her haunted past, that includes her sadist husband and mother. Later, he helps her to move forward in life.

title: Raju Gari Gadhi 2
desc: A group of three young friends decides to invest in a resort. However, things become complicated when they realise that it is haunted and take help of a mentalist to track down the ghost.
